name: add-widget-panel
title: Add-Widget Panel
description: Slide-in right "Add New Widget" panel: a titled header with a dismiss control, the Create / Predefined / User Define underline tabs, a search field, and a scrollable card grid. Composes the add-widget-tab, search-input and template-card atoms; tabs swap the body, search filters the cards, and the close button dismisses. Renders docked by default or as a fixed slide-in drawer via the --drawer modifier.
